mapper.select: SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.is_active = true AND kg.is_active = true AND tm.is_active = true ORDER BY ktm.priority DESC, ktm.confidence_score DESC

SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.keyword_group_id = #{keywordGroupId} AND ktm.is_active = true ORDER BY ktm.priority DESC, ktm.confidence_score DESC

SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.tag_id = #{tagId} AND ktm.is_active = true ORDER BY ktm.priority DESC, ktm.confidence_score DESC

SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.id = #{id}

SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.keyword_group_id = #{keywordGroupId} AND ktm.tag_id = #{tagId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO keyword_tag_mappings (keyword_group_id, tag_id, confidence_score, context_rules, priority, usage_count, is_active, created_at) VALUES (#{keywordGroupId}, #{tagId}, #{confidenceScore}, #{contextRules, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonNodeTypeHandler}::jsonb, #{priority}, #{usageCount}, #{isActive}, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE keyword_tag_mappings SET keyword_group_id = #{keywordGroupId}, tag_id = #{tagId}, confidence_score = #{confidenceScore}, context_rules = #{contextRules, typeHandler=com.moneyshift.api.config.JsonNodeTypeHandler}::jsonb, priority = #{priority}, usage_count = #{usageCount}, is_active = #{isActive} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.is_active = true AND kg.is_active = true AND tm.is_active = true ORDER BY ktm.usage_count DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT ktm.id, ktm.keyword_group_id, ktm.tag_id, ktm.confidence_score, ktm.context_rules, ktm.priority, ktm.usage_count, ktm.is_active, ktm.created_at, kg.id as kg_id, kg.group_name as kg_group_name, kg.primary_keyword as kg_primary_keyword, kg.synonyms as kg_synonyms, kg.category as kg_category, kg.confidence_base as kg_confidence_base, kg.is_active as kg_is_active, kg.created_at as kg_created_at, kg.updated_at as kg_updated_at, tm.id as tag_id, tm.tag_name, tm.tag_category, tm.description as tag_description, tm.color_hex as tag_color_hex, tm.icon_name as tag_icon_name, tm.display_order as tag_display_order, tm.is_active as tag_is_active, tm.created_at as tag_created_at FROM keyword_tag_mappings ktm JOIN keyword_groups kg ON ktm.keyword_group_id = kg.id JOIN tags_master tm ON ktm.tag_id = tm.id WHERE ktm.is_active = true AND kg.is_active = true AND tm.is_active = true AND ktm.confidence_score >= #{minConfidence} AND ktm.confidence_score <= #{maxConfidence} ORDER BY ktm.confidence_score DESC
